views.markdown: If you need help with "counter", you can contact ConorTheDev + Mirac, who is the developer. Sadly, we don't know their email.
You can also contact ConorTheDev + Mirac using the following sites:
ConorTheDev is the maintainer of the package "counter". Please contact them via email for any questions on this version of the package.
If you found a mistake in the depiction or cannot download the package, you can reach out to the maintainer of the "ConorTheDev's Repo" repo, ConorTheDev.
